title: indigofera sootepensis
intro: Indigofera sootepensis is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, native to Thailand. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Indigofera sootepensis is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and has also been used in traditional Thai medicine to treat various ailments.
